summary: Tested 7 features/fixes for financial tracking platform. All backend APIs pass (8/8 tests). Frontend features verified: Admin Dashboard widget with Email/Notify buttons, Mobile Menu Header with logo + '| The Hub', Mobile Trade Monitor sticky signal bar, Profit Tracker Daily Projection dialog with proper padding, 4-column desktop grid layout.

feature_1_mobile_sticky_signal.description: Mobile Trade Monitor shows sticky signal bar at top
feature_1_mobile_sticky_signal.evidence: Signal bar displays direction (BUY), product (MOIL10), and trade time (20:00)

feature_2_exit_trade_summary.description: Trade Control shows performance summary after submission with 'Adjust?' button
feature_2_exit_trade_summary.evidence: Code review confirms TradeMonitorPage.jsx lines 1506-1545 show trade submitted summary with Target, Actual, Performance Difference, and Adjust button

feature_3_admin_delete_trade.description: DELETE /api/admin/members/{user_id}/trades/{trade_id} endpoint exists and requires master_admin
feature_3_admin_delete_trade.evidence: Backend endpoint at server.py lines 2841-2897 deletes trade and deducts profit from balance

feature_4_dialog_padding.description: Daily Projection dialog has proper padding
feature_4_dialog_padding.evidence: Dialog opens with proper padding around content, title left-aligned on mobile

feature_5_mobile_menu_header.description: Mobile menu header shows platform logo + '| The Hub'
feature_5_mobile_menu_header.evidence: Screenshot confirms logo icon and 'The Hub' text in mobile menu header

feature_6_daily_projection_mobile.description: Daily Projection dialog has mobile-specific styling
feature_6_daily_projection_mobile.evidence: Dialog shows left-aligned title, proper column layout for mobile viewport

feature_7_admin_widget.description: Admin Dashboard 'Didn't Report Today' widget with Email/Notify buttons
feature_7_admin_widget.evidence: Widget shows: title 'Didn't Report Today', 'Email All' button, 'Notify All' button, individual Email/Notify buttons per member (10 each), 4-column grid on desktop

critical_code_review_comments: MissedTradersWidget.jsx properly implements Email All, Notify All, and per-user Email/Notify buttons with data-testid attributes
TradeMonitorPage.jsx includes mobile sticky signal bar (lines 1303-1323) with data-testid='mobile-sticky-signal'
MobileMenu.jsx shows logo + '| The Hub' in header (lines 149-179)
Backend endpoint DELETE /api/admin/members/{user_id}/trades/{trade_id} properly deducts profit from balance
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 features implemented and verified: 1) Mobile sticky signal bar on Trade Monitor, 2) Trade summary with Adjust button after submission, 3) Admin delete trade endpoint with balance deduction, 4) Dialog padding fixed, 5) Mobile menu header with logo + The Hub, 6) Mobile-specific dialog styling, 7) Redesigned widget with Email/Notify per user and bulk actions. Backend has new endpoints: DELETE /api/admin/members/{user_id}/trades/{trade_id} and GET /api/admin/analytics/today-stats.
